differential_diagnoses: Systemic lupus erythematosus with Libman-Sacks endocarditis
Disseminated malignancy with nonbacterial thrombotic endocarditis
next_steps: Send blood cultures for specialized organisms (HACEK, Bartonella, Coxiella, Brucella)
Antiphospholipid antibody panel and ANA reflex testing
Consultation with infectious disease, rheumatology, and cardiology
